item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapat bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus memiliki prioritas, tetapi saya juga menekankan bahwa hak individu tidak boleh terabaikan sepenuhnya.

notes: Agent A remains broadly society-first but visibly softens into a balance-and-rights-protection frame after Agent B's rights argument. Agent B stays individual-rights-first throughout, while acknowledging that social justice matters. All scoring is based on the written Indonesian text; no speculation beyond observable claims.
